concerns.text: FR-010 mandates including 'Process Duration' as a predictor feature. No task in Phase 3 (T012-T018) or the preprocessing pipeline (T016) explicitly describes fetching, calculating, or encoding this specific variable. T016a mentions imputation for Young's modulus/density but omits Process Duration.

FR-008 requires detecting and flagging unstructured PSD data (images, raw curves) with an OCR/extraction fallback. T014 implements PDF table extraction via pdfminer.six, but no task describes the logic to detect image-based PSDs, apply an OCR fallback, or flag entries to a log as required by the spec.

FR-009 requires an automatic fallback from GPR to Random Forest if time/memory limits are exceeded. While T023 implements monitoring and T024 implements RF, no single task explicitly defines the orchestration logic to 'attempt GPR first, then conditionally switch to RF only' within the training pipeline (T029). The tasks imply independent execution rather than a conditional fallback flow.

SC-002 and FR-004 specify evaluation on a 'held-out test set'. The plan and tasks (T021, T026) focus entirely on Nested Cross-Validation (outer folds). There is no task explicitly creating or managing a distinct, static 'held-out' split separate from the CV process, creating a gap in satisfying the specific 'held-out' requirement.
